open_positions.name: Advanced Energy Industries, Inc
open_positions.thesis: no mechanism. Catalyst: Semi-cap sympathy with SMH -2.6%; May 8 8-K likely annual meeting results. Falsified by: n/a.
open_positions.latest_reasoning: Thesis centered on semi-cap sympathy overstating the actual catalyst (routine annual meeting 8-K, not a governance surprise). Held 1 day; no news invalidating the sympathy fade hypothesis. Price down -1.94% in a flat tape suggests the sympathy is still working as predicted. Next 1-3 trading sessions will show whether AEIS mean-reverts faster than SMH peers (LRCX, AMAT, ACLS) on no fresh news — that would confirm the setup. Too early to declare victory or defeat.

open_positions.name: Texas Roadhouse, Inc.

open_positions.latest_reasoning: Held <1 day; thesis rests on Q1 earnings beat + capital return announcement (likely 8.01 item). Position is -3.64% unrealized despite the stock being flagged as LIKELY RATIONAL +12.3% on print — the entry was timed poorly (post-pop momentum already spent by entry). However, the underlying thesis (quality compounder with beat + buyback/dividend support) remains sound. New flag reappears as conf 4 LIKELY RATIONAL with same catalyst, validating the setup. HOLD pending earnings-call transcript confirmation of 8.01 = capital return and same-store sales beat sustainability.

closed_positions.name: Extreme Networks
closed_positions.exit_reasoning: Entered on thesis that EXTR was experiencing sympathy selling off CALX's -14% print—a short-term dislocations trade with 'days' horizon. 8 days in, EXTR has recovered +19% while XLK remains elevated, indicating the read-through trade has normalized and the catalyst (CALX weakness dragging peers) has exhausted its effect. Holding further exposes the portfolio to reversal risk without a fresh catalyst. The original high-confidence short-term mismatch has been arbitraged away. No evidence of broader enterprise IT weakness that would sustain further upside. Exit captures the gain and redeploys capital toward fresh opportunities.
